name: BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from DNS based servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers, BB:HostReference: DNS Servers
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers, BB:HostReference: DNS Servers
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events
